tasks.label: repair-install
args: if (Test-Path node_modules) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; npm cache clean --force; npm ci

tasks.label: git-commit-marker-fix
args: fix(home): add prod marker proof and enforce localized homepage rendering

tasks.label: agent-git-commit-restore-home
args: fix(home): restore localized homepage after render isolation test

tasks.label: generate-app-tree-exact
args: $appRoot=(Resolve-Path app).Path; $paths=Get-ChildItem app -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { if ($_.PSIsContainer) { $_.FullName.Substring($appRoot.Length+1).Replace('\\','/') + '/' } else { $_.FullName.Substring($appRoot.Length+1).Replace('\\','/') } } | Sort-Object; $paths | Set-Content app-tree-exact.txt -Encoding utf8; Get-Content app-tree-exact.txt | Select-Object -First 20; "TOTAL_LINES=$((Get-Content app-tree-exact.txt).Count)"

tasks.label: agent-req-commitpush-if-needed-20260225
args: git add app/page.tsx middleware.ts && git commit -m "chore(debug): hard isolate root homepage by disabling middleware" && git push origin main

tasks.label: agent-layout-probe-commit-20260225
args: git add app/layout.tsx && git commit -m "chore(debug): temporary root layout probe marker" && git push origin main

tasks.label: agent-layout-probe-commit-ps-20260225
args: git add app/layout.tsx; git commit -m 'chore(debug): temporary root layout probe marker'; git push origin main

tasks.label: agent-research-vercel-root-20260225
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Output 'STEP1_VERCEL_JSON_BEGIN'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'vercel.json') { Write-Output 'EXISTS'; Get-Content -LiteralPath 'vercel.json' -Raw } else { Write-Output 'MISSING' }; Write-Output 'STEP1_VERCEL_JSON_END'; Write-Output 'STEP2_NEXT_CONFIG_RELEVANT_BEGIN'; Select-String -Path 'next.config.js' -Pattern 'rootDir|distDir|output|module\.exports|nextConfig|withNextIntl|swcMinify|experimental' -CaseSensitive:$false | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}' -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.TrimEnd() }; Write-Output 'STEP2_NEXT_CONFIG_RELEVANT_END'; Write-Output 'STEP2_PACKAGE_SCRIPTS_AND_ROOTDIR_BEGIN'; $pkg = Get-Content -LiteralPath 'package.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output 'SCRIPTS:'; $pkg.scripts.PSObject.Properties | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { '{0}={1}' -f $_.Name, $_.Value }; Write-Output 'ROOTDIR_MATCH_LINES:'; Select-String -Path 'package.json' -Pattern 'rootDir' -CaseSensitive:$false | ForEach-Object { '{0}:{1}' -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.TrimEnd() }; Write-Output 'STEP2_PACKAGE_SCRIPTS_AND_ROOTDIR_END'; Write-Output 'STEP3_APP_DIRS_BEGIN'; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory -Recurse -Filter 'app' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\node_modules\\|\\\.git\\|\\\.next\\' } | ForEach-Object { (Resolve-Path -Relative $_.FullName) -replace '\\','/' } | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Output 'STEP3_APP_DIRS_END'; Write-Output 'STEP4_SRC_APP_BEGIN'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'src/app') { Write-Output 'src/app EXISTS' } else { Write-Output 'src/app MISSING' }; Write-Output 'STEP4_SRC_APP_END'; Write-Output 'STEP5_VERCEL_INSPECT_BEGIN'; $inspect = vercel project inspect avatar-g-frontend-v3 --yes 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output $inspect.TrimEnd(); Write-Output 'ROOT_DIRECTORY_EXTRACT:'; (($inspect -split "`r?`n") | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Root Directory' } | Select-Object -First 1); Write-Output 'STEP5_VERCEL_INSPECT_END'; Write-Output 'STEP6_REPO_TREE_BEGIN'; $exclude = @('.git','node_modules','.next'); $entries = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; function Add-Tree([string]$abs,[string]$rel){ $children = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $abs -Force | Sort-Object Name; foreach($child in $children){ if($exclude -contains $child.Name){ continue }; $childRel = if([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($rel)) { $child.Name } else { "$rel/$($child.Name)" }; if($child.PSIsContainer){ $entries.Add("$childRel/"); Add-Tree -abs $child.FullName -rel $childRel } else { $entries.Add($childRel) } } }; Add-Tree -abs (Get-Location).Path -rel ''; Set-Content -LiteralPath 'repo-tree-full.txt' -Value $entries; Write-Output ('REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES=' + $entries.Count); Write-Output 'REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN'; $entries | Select-Object -First 40; Write-Output 'REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END'; Write-Output 'STEP6_REPO_TREE_END'

tasks.label: agent-step1-vercel-json-20260225
args: if exist vercel.json (echo EXISTS & type vercel.json) else echo MISSING

tasks.label: agent-step6-generate-repo-tree-20260225
args: const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const out=path.join(root,'repo-tree-full.txt');const exclude=new Set(['.git','node_modules','.next']);const entries=[];function walk(abs,rel){const kids=fs.readdirSync(abs,{withFileTypes:true}).sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name));for(const d of kids){if(exclude.has(d.name)) continue;const childRel=rel?`${rel}/${d.name}`:d.name;const childAbs=path.join(abs,d.name);if(d.isDirectory()){entries.push(`${childRel}/`);walk(childAbs,childRel);}else{entries.push(childRel);}}}walk(root,'');fs.writeFileSync(out,entries.join('\n')+(entries.length?'\n':''));console.log('REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES='+entries.length);console.log('REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN');for(const line of entries.slice(0,40)) console.log(line);console.log('REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END');

tasks.label: agent-step6-generate-repo-tree-20260225-v2
args: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const out=path.join(root,'repo-tree-full.txt');const exclude=new Set(['.git','node_modules','.next']);const entries=[];function walk(abs,rel){const kids=fs.readdirSync(abs,{withFileTypes:true}).sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name));for(const d of kids){if(exclude.has(d.name)) continue;const childRel=rel?rel+'/'+d.name:d.name;const childAbs=path.join(abs,d.name);if(d.isDirectory()){entries.push(childRel+'/');walk(childAbs,childRel);}else{entries.push(childRel);}}}walk(root,'');fs.writeFileSync(out,entries.join('\n')+(entries.length?'\n':''));console.log('REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES='+entries.length);console.log('REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN');entries.slice(0,40).forEach(l=>console.log(l));console.log('REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END');"

tasks.label: agent-step6-generate-repo-tree-20260225-v3
args: $exclude=@(".git","node_modules",".next"); $entries=New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; function AddTree([string]$abs,[string]$rel){ $children=Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $abs -Force | Sort-Object Name; foreach($child in $children){ if($exclude -contains $child.Name){ continue }; $childRel=if([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($rel)){ $child.Name } else { $rel + "/" + $child.Name }; if($child.PSIsContainer){ $entries.Add($childRel + "/"); AddTree -abs $child.FullName -rel $childRel } else { $entries.Add($childRel) } } }; AddTree -abs (Get-Location).Path -rel ""; Set-Content -LiteralPath "repo-tree-full.txt" -Value $entries; Write-Output ("REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES=" + $entries.Count); Write-Output "REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN"; $entries | Select-Object -First 40; Write-Output "REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END"

tasks.label: agent-step6-generate-repo-tree-20260225-v4
args: $exclude=@(".git","node_modules",".next"); $entries=New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; function AddTree([string]$abs,[string]$rel){ $children=Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $abs -Force | Sort-Object Name; foreach($child in $children){ if($exclude -contains $child.Name){ continue }; $childRel=if([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($rel)){ $child.Name } else { [string]::Concat($rel,[char]47,$child.Name) }; if($child.PSIsContainer){ $entries.Add([string]::Concat($childRel,[char]47)); AddTree -abs $child.FullName -rel $childRel } else { $entries.Add($childRel) } } }; AddTree -abs (Get-Location).Path -rel ""; Set-Content -LiteralPath "repo-tree-full.txt" -Value $entries; Write-Output ("REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES=" + $entries.Count); Write-Output "REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN"; $entries | Select-Object -First 40; Write-Output "REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END"

tasks.label: agent-step6-generate-repo-tree-gitls-20260225
args: git ls-files > repo-tree-full.txt & powershell -NoProfile -Command "$lines=Get-Content repo-tree-full.txt; Write-Output ('REPO_TREE_TOTAL_LINES=' + $lines.Count); Write-Output 'REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_BEGIN'; $lines | Select-Object -First 40; Write-Output 'REPO_TREE_FIRST_40_END'"

tasks.label: tmp-npx-vercel-inspect-to-file
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "npx vercel project inspect avatar-g-frontend-v3 --yes > tmp_vercel_project_inspect.txt 2>&1 & echo EXITCODE=%ERRORLEVEL%>> tmp_vercel_project_inspect.txt"

tasks.label: agent-user-commit-only-3-files-20260226
tasks.command: git reset; git add -- 'app/layout.tsx' 'app/page.tsx' 'app/[locale]/page.tsx'; git commit -m 'fix(prod): restore app shell and add temporary homepage marker'; git push origin main

tasks.label: agent-user-commit-push-and-capture-20260226
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "git reset && git add -- app/layout.tsx app/page.tsx app/[locale]/page.tsx && git commit -m ""fix(prod): restore app shell and add temporary homepage marker"" && git push origin main && git log -1 --oneline > __out1.txt && git show --name-only --pretty=format: -1 > __out2.txt && git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main > __out3.txt"

tasks.label: agent-myavatar-research-checks-20260226
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $urls=@('https://www.myavatar.ge/','https://www.myavatar.ge/en','https://www.myavatar.ge/ka','https://www.myavatar.ge/ru','https://www.myavatar.ge/api/health'); Write-Output 'PAGE_CHECKS_START'; foreach($u in $urls){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -MaximumRedirection 10 -ErrorAction Stop; $c=[string]$r.Content; $status=[int]$r.StatusCode; $ok=$c.Contains('MYAVATAR OK'); $aiEn=$c.Contains('AI platform'); $aiKa=$c.Contains('AI პლატფორმა'); Write-Output ("$u`t$status`t$ok`t$aiEn`t$aiKa"); } catch { $s='ERR'; if($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode){ $s=[int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode }; Write-Output ("$u`t$s`tFalse`tFalse`tFalse"); } }; Write-Output 'PAGE_CHECKS_END'; $ua='Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1'; Write-Output 'MOBILE_SAFARI_START'; try { $r2=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://www.myavatar.ge/' -MaximumRedirection 10 -UserAgent $ua -ErrorAction Stop; $c2=[string]$r2.Content; $s2=[int]$r2.StatusCode; $ok2=$c2.Contains('MYAVATAR OK'); Write-Output ("https://www.myavatar.ge/`t$s2`t$ok2"); } catch { $s2='ERR'; if($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode){ $s2=[int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode }; Write-Output ("https://www.myavatar.ge/`t$s2`tFalse"); }; Write-Output 'MOBILE_SAFARI_END'

tasks.label: agent-user-commit-push-final-20260226
args: git add -- ":(literal)app/layout.tsx" ":(literal)app/page.tsx" ":(literal)app/[locale]/layout.tsx" ":(literal)app/[locale]/page.tsx" ":(literal)app/api/health/route.ts"; git commit -m "fix(prod): restore homepage rendering and finalize health endpoint" -- ":(literal)app/layout.tsx" ":(literal)app/page.tsx" ":(literal)app/[locale]/layout.tsx" ":(literal)app/[locale]/page.tsx" ":(literal)app/api/health/route.ts"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { git push origin main }; git log -1 --oneline > __req_git_out_1.txt; git show --name-only --pretty="" -1 > __req_git_out_2.txt; git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main > __req_git_out_3.txt

tasks.label: start-check
tasks.command: Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 5; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; npm run build
